title: Prove execution metadata persists into opened-position artifact via isolated DB path
objective: Use a controlled isolated DB proof path to show that the rich execution-bound metadata persists into an opened-position artifact without mutating the real production DB or placing a live trade.
acceptance_criteria: rich metadata fields visibly present or explicitly absent
recommended_size_dollars behavior proven in persisted artifact path
final result is VERIFIED, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED
rollback: Proof-only. Remove the temporary isolated DB/helper script if cleanup is desired.
